title: Vader's apprentice (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vader's apprentice''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*The "[[Corvax descendant]]" that [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] instructed in the Force briefly.
*'''[[Vader's Apprentice (Rieve)|Vader's Apprentice]]''', a [[Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Vader]]-inspired costume sometimes worn by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Rieve]] for the [[Hunters of the Outer Rim]] competition on the [[planet]] [[Vespaara]].

==Legends==
*[[Galen Marek|'''Galen Marek''']], codenamed '''Starkiller''', was the son of a [[Kento Marek|Jedi fugitive]] killed by Vader during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. After his father's death, he was trained by Vader since childhood to become the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|secret apprentice]].
**[[Dark Apprentice|'''Dark Apprentice''']], the only "perfect" [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the original Starkiller, trained to take Marek's place as Vader's new Sith apprentice. Regarded as perfect by Vader due to being the only clone that purged himself of Marek's memories and emotions and devoted himself entirely to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]].
**[[Subject 1138|'''Starkiller''']], another clone of the late Galen Marek and initially a prospective apprentice for Darth Vader.
*[[Tao (Jedi)|'''Tao''']], a former Jedi Padawan, and the second secret apprentice of Darth Vader. {{C|non-canon}}
*'''[[Kharys]]''', a [[S'kytri]] who was discovered by Skywalker during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He promised to train her after the wars were over and he kept his promise even after his fall to the dark side.
*'''[[Lumiya]]''', an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] that eventually became a student of Darth Vader as his potential [[Shadow Hand]].
*'''[[Flint]]''', the son of a Clone Wars Jedi, [[Flint Torul]], and eventual [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. He was eventually selected by Darth Vader to receive exclusive training as a foil to Lumiya and potential Shadow Hand.
*'''[[Rillao]]''', a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Firrerreo/Legends|Firrerreo]] who was delivered to Vader by [[Antinnis Tremayne]] for training. However, she resisted the lure of the dark side and fled from the Dark Lord's service.
*'''[[Hethrir]]''', a Force-sensitive Firrerreo and mate of Rillao who was more susceptible to the call of the dark side, eventually becoming the [[Procurator of Justice]].
*[[Antinnis Tremayne|'''Antinnis Tremayne''']], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[High Inquisitor]] who trained under Vader's auspices shortly after the conclusion of the Clone Wars.
*[[Vost Tyne|'''Vost Tyne''']], a retired [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who had befriended Vader and trained under him.

{{Disambig}}
